name: agentic-coding-fitness
description: A 16-skill curriculum-and-practice platform for building production agentic AI. Folds the Agentic Coding Fitness course into teach → runnable code → guided-lab skills: the fundamentals (LLM APIs, tool use, agent loops, MCP & skills, RAG, multi-agent systems, knowledge-graph memory, production GraphRAG) PLUS the canonical 12-pattern taxonomy, production & observability, agent evaluation with CI gating, a drill library, the 16-week curriculum, vibe-coding & security, the A2A protocol, and the craft of authoring your own skills. Most skills point at real weekN/ code in this repo; a few (A2A, parts of the curriculum/vibe-coding) are honestly flagged as conceptual.

author.name: Agentic Coding Fitness @ Rust Tech Bar
